steps.title: Find the rectangle area
steps.content:
Rectangle $X$ has length $32$ and width $16.5$, so its area is
$$32\cdot16.5=528$$

steps.title: Find the triangle area
steps.content:
The rectangle's area is $3$ times the triangle's area, so the triangle's area is
$$\frac{528}{3}=176$$

steps.title: Use base and height
steps.content:
For right triangle $Y$, base $=22$ and area $=176$.
$$\frac12(22)h=176$$
$$11h=176$$
$$h=16$$The answer is B.
